import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_item_exactly_fills_capacity():
    # Item with weight==capacity should be selectable; bug excludes it (weight < j, not weight <= j)
    result = knapsack(3, [(3, 10), (1, 5)])
    assert result == 10, f"Expected 10 (take item of weight 3, value 10) but got {result}"
